last_low_bal_alrt_subscrn_dt.description: Date of customer's most recent subscription to Low Balance Alerts. Dates are capped at 12 months for query optimization purposes. Records that are NULL either have not had activity within this date range or have never populated a value associated with this data element.

last_od_tran_dt.title: DateOfLastOverdraftTxn

last_use_cardonoff_dt.title: DateOfLastCardOnOffUse

Records that are NULL either have not had activity within this date range or have never populated a value associated with this data element.

naics_cd.title: CDNAICCode
naics_cd.description: The North American Industrial Classification code is a six digit code that represents an industry classification system that groups establishments into industries based on the activities in which thay are primarily engaged.  It is a comprehensive system covering the entire field of economic activities, producing and non-producing.

upcmng_sml_bus_cd_mat_dt.description: Maturity Date of the soonest to mature Small Business CD belonging to the customer. This field is only populated for customers owning Business Time Accounts (Product Code = B4)

upcmng_sml_bus_cd_pcode.title: CDSmallBusProductCd
upcmng_sml_bus_cd_pcode.description: Combination of the product type and sub product code of the soonest to mature Small Business CD belonging to the customer. This field is only populated for customers owning Business Time Accounts (Product Code = B4)

sml_bus_dep_csh_mtd_amt.title: SmBusDepositCashMtdAmt
sml_bus_dep_csh_mtd_amt.description: Dollar amount of cash deposits for calendar month for all small business accounts owned by the customer

sml_bus_chk_mtd_cnt.title: SmBusCheckMtdCount
sml_bus_chk_mtd_cnt.description: Count of checks posted and not reversed for calendar month for all small business accounts owned by the customer. This number represents the number of checks that attempted to post to the account. This includes paid items and rejected items. There are 2 classes of rejected items that increment the counter: the first is those that are rejected due to OBP/OTP classifications, the second is those rejected based on rules from the risk models (such as Good Decisions).

ownr_of_bus_ind.title: OwnershipOfBusInd
ownr_of_bus_ind.description: Indicates if the customer has an ownership relationship with a business

prmr_chk_acct_digitally_opn_in_the_lst_6.title: PremierChkActDgtOpnLst60Day
prmr_chk_acct_digitally_opn_in_the_lst_6.description: Indicates if the customer had digitally opened a Premier Checking Account in the last 60 days. A value of 1 indicates that the customer has met the above criteria and a value of 0 indicates that the customer has not

primaryEmailAddress.title: Primary Email Address
primaryEmailAddress.description: Primary Email address SHA256 encrypted . Can be used as an identity for matching audiences/profile

primaryPhone.title: Primary Phone
primaryPhone.description: Primary phone number SHA256 encrypted . Can be used as an identity for matching audiences/profile

osmp_appl_id.title: OSMP Application ID
osmp_appl_id.description: OSMP Application ID is an internal application number generated by platform.

title: CAP WFMRM Foundational Schema
description: Schema to capture CAPMRM Foundational attributes
